nav.videoCommerceDesc: Stories, carousel and product highlights with shoppable video — across your entire e-commerce store
nav.liveCommerceDesc: Live streams with a real-time cart and direct audience engagement
nav.tryOnDesc: Virtual try-on experience that removes the #1 barrier to purchase

hero.title: Drive sales by building confidence in the
hero.description: If shoppers don't understand the value of your product, they'll buy somewhere else.
hero.descriptionBold: That's why with Widde you help every visitor feel, understand, choose and buy on your site.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: The online experience is still pushing shoppers away
problem.description: Stores that don't invest in experience lose sales every day to fear, doubt and poor product presentation.
problem.stat1Label: abandon their cart fearing the product won't match the description
problem.stat2Label: give up due to poor e-commerce experiences
problem.stat3Label: higher conversion in stores with video in the shopping journey

videoCommerce.descBold: Go beyond static images with videos in Carousels, Highlights and Stories
videoCommerce.desc: throughout your e-commerce pages. Shoppers see the product in action, grasp every detail and resolve their objections just by watching.
videoCommerce.stat1: More time on page with video

liveCommerce.title: Live Commerce
liveCommerce.descBold: A live stream where the sale actually happens.
liveCommerce.desc: Shoppers watch, engage, ask questions in real time, see product details live and buy during the stream — without ever leaving your site.
liveCommerce.desc2Bold: Creates urgency, connection and brand trust.
liveCommerce.stat2: Higher average order value during live sessions

tryOn.title: AI Try-On
tryOn.desc: Your customer tries the product on their own body through a photo, just like being in a physical store — but right on your site.
tryOn.descBold: For clothing and footwear: they see how it looks before deciding.
tryOn.desc2Bold: Less hesitation at checkout, fewer returns afterward.
tryOn.stat1: Shopper satisfaction with the try-on result

integrations.title: Integrate seamlessly with the platform you already use
integrations.description: No development required. Widde works with the leading e-commerce platforms.

plans.label: Plans
plans.title: Choose how to get started
plans.starterDesc: For stores in the early stages of content
plans.proRecommended: Recommended for mid-size and large brands
plans.proDesc: Talk to sales to build the ideal plan
plans.proCardTitle: For brands that want to grow for real
plans.proCardDesc: Large retailers have unique challenges. The PRO plan is designed for your scenario: volume, solutions and integrations.

cases.label: Real results
cases.title: Those who use it are already converting more
cases.description: Case studies from brands that transformed the shopping experience with Widde.

hero.title: Accelerate purchase decisions with
hero.description: Turn any video content into an immersive shopping experience, directly on your e-commerce store — without leaving the site.
hero.feature1: Stories, carousel, highlights and explore across the entire site
hero.feature2: Dev-free integration — live in less than 1 day
hero.feature3: In-video cart, without interrupting the experience

why.label: Why video commerce
why.title: Video is the highest-converting format in e-commerce
why.description: Shoppers who watch a product video are far more likely to buy. Video removes objections, builds trust and brings the product closer to the customer's reality.
why.stat1: of shoppers prefer watching a video to reading about a product
why.stat2: more time on page in sessions that include video
why.stat3: lift in add-to-cart rate with shoppable video

formats.label: Formats
formats.title: Every video format your store needs

stories.name: Stories
stories.description: Full-screen vertical content. High immersion and engagement — the format shoppers already know.

carousel.name: Video Carousel
carousel.description: Showcase multiple products in sequence. Visitors discover more items without leaving the page.

highlights.name: Store Highlights
highlights.description: Social-feed style layout for campaigns, launches and collections. Immersive and to the point.

productHighlights.name: Product Highlights
productHighlights.description: Videos organized by theme on the PDP — how to use, materials, looks. Customers resolve every objection before buying.

explore.name: Explore
explore.description: A page dedicated entirely to video — your store's own TikTok. Maximum engagement and product discovery.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to convert with video

card1.title: In-video cart
card1.description: Shoppers add to cart without leaving the video. Zero friction between discovery and purchase.

card2.title: Per-video data
card2.description: Views, engagement, clicks and conversions per video. Understand exactly which content drives the most sales.

card3.title: Zero speed impact
card3.description: Proprietary streaming infrastructure. Videos don't slow down your store — Core Web Vitals fully preserved.

card4.title: Video comments
card4.description: Receive and respond to customer questions directly on your videos. Widde AI filters and organizes them automatically.

cta.label: Talk to sales
cta.title: Ready to transform your e-commerce with video?
cta.description: Our team responds within 24 hours and puts together a custom proposal for your business.

quote.text: "Since we started working with Widde, the experience on our e-commerce has reached a whole new level of interactivity."
quote.author: E-commerce Team
